content: GitHub official docs provide artifact attestations using contents:read, id-token:write, and attestations:write; consumers can verify artifacts with gh attestation verify. GitHub recommends least-privilege GITHUB_TOKEN, OIDC instead of long-lived cloud credentials where supported, and pinning actions to full commit SHAs. These can attest deterministic packages, but mooncakes publishing still appears to require its own stored token, so publication must isolate that credential in a protected job.
